name: testAddAcquirerFormOpensWithCorrectHeaderAndFieldsAndClosesCorrectly
description: Verify that the 'Add Acquirer' form opens with the correct header and input fields, and closes correctly.
descriptionHtml: Verify that the 'Add Acquirer' form opens with the correct header and input fields, and closes correctly.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: the header contains the expected title text
Verify: all placeholders are correct for each field
Verify: the Status Switch visible and contains switch Active&Inactive
Verify: the 'Allowed Currencies' Checkboxes visible and contains USD&EUR
